title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.609 - Authority, state and state employees no liability, when
text:
260.609.  Authority, state and state employees no liability, when. — The state of Missouri, its employees or the revitalization authority shall not be held liable for any injury caused by a dangerous condition at any abandoned or uncontrolled site as a result of the actions taken on behalf of the state or the revitalization agency under sections 260.600 to 260.607.
(L. 1983 H.B. 528 § 8) 
Effective 6-27-83
